Before You Go
Wednesday 17 June — Day before departure
Wednesday 17 June
Pre-Departure To-Dos

  • Day📶Buy Patrick's roaming SIM

Outbound Journey
Thursday 18 June — Saturday 20 June
Thursday 18 June
Harrogate → Manchester
  • 16:05🚕Taxi home → Harrogate Train Station

Manchester → Singapore

Saturday 20 June

Koh Samui
Saturday 20 June — Monday 22 June · 2 nights · Breakfast included
Sat 20 — Sun 21 June
Arrival & First Full Day
  • 🏖️Settle into your Sea Front Suite — private bay views

  • Daily🍳Breakfast included

Monday 22 June
Samui → Koh Tao

✅ All transfers booked
🤿
Koh Tao
Monday 22 June — Friday 26 June · 4 nights · Breakfast included
Mon 22 — Thu 25 June
Haad Tien Beach Resort
  • 🏡Haadtien Villa — free upgrade from Getaway Villa
  • 🤿World-class diving & snorkelling, Haad Tien Bay
  • 🚤Secluded bay — boat or steps access only, no road
  • Daily🍳Breakfast included
🏡 Haadtien Villa · Complimentary upgrade
Friday 26 June

  • 08:30🚤Free shuttle to Koh Tao ferry

  • 10:30🚗Transfer to Buri Rasa Booked

🌙

Friday 26 June — Tuesday 30 June · 4 nights · Breakfast included

Island Overview

Three Islands

Koh Samui, Koh Tao and Koh Phangan — all tucked into the Gulf of Thailand, connected by ferry.

Where You're Staying

Four Hotels, Three Islands

Boutique luxury from a private coral bay to a hillside spa — all with breakfast included (except the overnight at Tribe).

Travel Notes

Good to Know

The practical stuff — so the only thing you're thinking about is the next cocktail.

✈️
Flights
  • SQ 301 — MAN → SIN · Fri 19 June · departs 10:35 · Premium Economy
  • TR 0660 — SIN → USM · Sat 20 June · Scoot
  • SQ 8587 — USM → SIN · Sat 4 July · departs 19:45, arr 22:45
  • SQ 302 — SIN → MAN · Sun 5 July · departs 02:10, arr 09:15 · Premium Economy
  • Check in online 48 hrs before each flight
⛴️
Ferries & Transfers
  • All transfers and ferries fully booked ✅
  • Ferry: Koh Samui → Koh Tao · 12:30, Mon 22 June · 1hr 45min
  • Ferry: Koh Tao → Koh Phangan · 09:30, Fri 26 June · 1hr
  • Speedboat: hotel pier → Koh Samui · 10:30, Tue 30 June
  • Return: Mercedes E-Class chauffeur from MAN Airport to Harrogate
🍳
Breakfast & Meals
  • Tribe Hotel — dinner booked Thurs 8pm, no breakfast
  • Garrya Tongsai Bay — breakfast included ✅
  • Haad Tien Beach Resort — breakfast included ✅
  • Buri Rasa Koh Phangan — breakfast included ✅
  • Cielo Samui — breakfast included ✅
💰
Money
  • Currency: Thai Baht (THB) — £500 worth to collect before travel
  • ATMs widespread in Samui; more limited on Koh Tao
  • Time zone: ICT (UTC+7) — 6 hours ahead of UK BST
🌡️
Weather & Packing
  • June/July — 30–33°C, humid, occasional tropical showers
  • Lightweight quick-dry clothing — linen for evenings
  • Dry bag essential for boat and beach days
  • Waterproof sandals recommended for Haad Tien steps
📱
Connectivity
  • Patrick's roaming SIM — buy before departure
  • Grab app works across Koh Samui for rides
  • Haad Tien Beach Resort — WiFi limited by design; embrace it
  • Singapore Changi — free WiFi throughout transit
